summary: Iteration 66: Verified plan-validator.js fixes for 'Invalid plan' error. All tests passed. The two fixes are working correctly: (1) Project ID mismatch check downgraded from error to warning-only (line 33-34), (2) Max file count increased from 10 to 30 (line 152). Full E2E flow tested: Login -> New Project -> Fill Creative Brief -> Click Start Building -> AI auto-builds 7 files successfully without any 'Invalid plan', 'Plan targets wrong project', 'exceeds maximum', or 'PATCH FAILED' errors.

issues: CORS error for react-router-dom@6 UMD script from unpkg.com - non-blocking, logged in console

critical_code_review_comments: plan-validator.js line 33-34: projectId mismatch now pushes to warnings array (not errors) - FIX VERIFIED
plan-validator.js line 152: Max file count increased to 30 (was 10) - FIX VERIFIED
plan-executor.js line 28: 'Invalid plan:' error source confirmed - only triggers when validation fails
Auto-execute flow for new projects working correctly with 7 files generated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plan validator fixes verified. The 'Invalid plan' error no longer appears when creating new projects from Creative Brief. The projectId check is now warning-only (doesn't block execution), and the file count limit is 30 (allows larger plans). Test flow: Login -> New Project -> Fill Creative Brief (elevator_pitch minimum) -> Click Start Building -> AI auto-builds successfully.
